TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: liyal u liyal hananay u ahecaday ku nananuman, u liyal 70.8% ku ahecaday a nanum,u lalesing nu liyal iri nu kanatal(cikiw)u sapahanhan, mikilim ku tamdaw tu liyal makacaway ku nanum sa,araw mabana kuheni makahacaway,makasawaliyay, masakasatipan ,sakatimul,sakaamisay a liyal saan, Ku kabana nu tametamedaw. U liyal iri adahay kumamamaanay a buting, ira ku tataangay abuting ira ku adidiay abuting. Mibuting sa ku tamedaw,u mitabukud patiked mibuting mamaanay,u sakaulahan nu tamedaw a mibuting iri u mipatikeday . Sisa u nanum nu liyal u aheciday,anini u liyal mauning kunanum ,ahecidaca ku nanum sa raecus a nanuman kuliyalay a nanum.u liyalay a nanum matiya caay alaen kucilah raecus a pananum tu umah,anini mabana tu kicic ku tamedaw ,alaen ku cilah kiya madengay tu pananum madengay tu ananuman. U nanum nu liyal dengay sa ku baedet,u ruimad tahekal ku cidal melangaw kudamay kusalulul,mitiay away kucidal caay ka lemangaw ku damay,anini caledes ku kiciw ,awayay tu kudamay.
S.PHON: ɾijaɾ o~u~u ɾijaɾ ħananaj o~u~u aħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u~u nanano~u~uman, o~u~u ɾijaɾ **.*% ko~u~u aħəʦaɬ~ɮaj a nano~u~um,o~u~u ɾaɾəsiŋ no~u~u ɾijaɾ iri no~u~u kanataɾ(ʦikiw)o~u~u sapaħanħan, mikiɾim ko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u~u ɾijaɾ makaʦawaj ko~u~u nano~u~um sa,araw mab~b~vana ko~u~uħəni makaħaʦawaj,makasawaɾijaj, masakasatipan ,sakatimo~u~uɾ,sakaamisaj a ɾijaɾ saan, ko~u~u kab~b~vana no~u~u tamətaməɬ~ɮaw. o~u~u ɾijaɾ iri aɬ~ɮaħaj ko~u~umamamaanaj a b~b~vo~u~utiŋ, ira ko~u~u tataaŋaj ab~b~vo~u~utiŋ ira ko~u~u aɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj ab~b~vo~u~utiŋ. mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ sa ko~u~u taməɬ~ɮaw,o~u~u mitab~b~vo~u~uko~u~uɬ~ɮ patikəɬ~ɮ mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ mamaanaj,o~u~u sakao~u~uɾaħan no~u~u taməɬ~ɮaw a mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ iri o~u~u mipatikəɬ~ɮaj . sisa o~u~u nano~u~um no~u~u ɾijaɾ o~u~u aħəʦiɬ~ɮaj,anini o~u~u ɾijaɾ mao~u~uniŋ ko~u~unano~u~um ,aħəʦiɬ~ɮaʦa ko~u~u nano~u~um sa raəʦo~u~us a nano~u~uman ko~u~uɾijaɾaj a nano~u~um.o~u~u ɾijaɾaj a nano~u~um matija ʦaaj aɾaən ko~u~uʦiɾaħ raəʦo~u~us a panano~u~um to~u~u o~u~umaħ,anini mab~b~vana to~u~u kiʦiʦ ko~u~u taməɬ~ɮaw ,aɾaən ko~u~u ʦiɾaħ kija maɬ~ɮəŋaj to~u~u panano~u~um maɬ~ɮəŋaj to~u~u anano~u~uman. o~u~u nano~u~um no~u~u ɾijaɾ ɬ~ɮəŋaj sa ko~u~u b~b~vaəɬ~ɮət,o~u~u ro~u~uimaɬ~ɮ taħəkaɾ ko~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ məɾaŋaw ko~u~uɬ~ɮamaj ko~u~usaɾo~u~uɾo~u~uɾ,mitiaj awaj ko~u~uʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ʦaaj ka ɾəmaŋaw ko~u~u ɬ~ɮamaj,anini ʦaɾəɬ~ɮəs ko~u~u kiʦiw ,awajaj to~u~u ko~u~uɬ~ɮamaj.
S.FORM: liyal u liyal hananay u ahecaday ku nananuman, u liyal 70.8% ku ahecaday a nanum,u lalesing nu liyal iri nu kanatal(cikiw)u sapahanhan, mikilim ku tamdaw tu liyal makacaway ku nanum sa,araw mabana kuheni makahacaway,makasawaliyay, masakasatipan ,sakatimul,sakaamisay a liyal saan, Ku kabana nu tametamedaw. U liyal iri adahay kumamamaanay a buting, ira ku tataangay abuting ira ku adidiay abuting. Mibuting sa ku tamedaw,u mitabukud patiked mibuting mamaanay,u sakaulahan nu tamedaw a mibuting iri u mipatikeday . Sisa u nanum nu liyal u aheciday,anini u liyal mauning kunanum ,ahecidaca ku nanum sa raecus a nanuman kuliyalay a nanum.u liyalay a nanum matiya caay alaen kucilah raecus a pananum tu umah,anini mabana tu kicic ku tamedaw ,alaen ku cilah kiya madengay tu pananum madengay tu ananuman. U nanum nu liyal dengay sa ku baedet,u ruimad tahekal ku cidal melangaw kudamay kusalulul,mitiay away kucidal caay ka lemangaw ku damay,anini caledes ku kiciw ,awayay tu kudamay.
S.PHON: ɾijaɾ o~u~u ɾijaɾ ħananaj o~u~u aħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u~u nanano~u~uman, o~u~u ɾijaɾ **.*% ko~u~u aħəʦaɬ~ɮaj a nano~u~um,o~u~u ɾaɾəsiŋ no~u~u ɾijaɾ iri no~u~u kanataɾ(ʦikiw)o~u~u sapaħanħan, mikiɾim ko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u~u ɾijaɾ makaʦawaj ko~u~u nano~u~um sa,araw mab~b~vana ko~u~uħəni makaħaʦawaj,makasawaɾijaj, masakasatipan ,sakatimo~u~uɾ,sakaamisaj a ɾijaɾ saan, ko~u~u kab~b~vana no~u~u tamətaməɬ~ɮaw. o~u~u ɾijaɾ iri aɬ~ɮaħaj ko~u~umamamaanaj a b~b~vo~u~utiŋ, ira ko~u~u tataaŋaj ab~b~vo~u~utiŋ ira ko~u~u aɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj ab~b~vo~u~utiŋ. mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ sa ko~u~u taməɬ~ɮaw,o~u~u mitab~b~vo~u~uko~u~uɬ~ɮ patikəɬ~ɮ mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ mamaanaj,o~u~u sakao~u~uɾaħan no~u~u taməɬ~ɮaw a mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ iri o~u~u mipatikəɬ~ɮaj . sisa o~u~u nano~u~um no~u~u ɾijaɾ o~u~u aħəʦiɬ~ɮaj,anini o~u~u ɾijaɾ mao~u~uniŋ ko~u~unano~u~um ,aħəʦiɬ~ɮaʦa ko~u~u nano~u~um sa raəʦo~u~us a nano~u~uman ko~u~uɾijaɾaj a nano~u~um.o~u~u ɾijaɾaj a nano~u~um matija ʦaaj aɾaən ko~u~uʦiɾaħ raəʦo~u~us a panano~u~um to~u~u o~u~umaħ,anini mab~b~vana to~u~u kiʦiʦ ko~u~u taməɬ~ɮaw ,aɾaən ko~u~u ʦiɾaħ kija maɬ~ɮəŋaj to~u~u panano~u~um maɬ~ɮəŋaj to~u~u anano~u~uman. o~u~u nano~u~um no~u~u ɾijaɾ ɬ~ɮəŋaj sa ko~u~u b~b~vaəɬ~ɮət,o~u~u ro~u~uimaɬ~ɮ taħəkaɾ ko~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ məɾaŋaw ko~u~uɬ~ɮamaj ko~u~usaɾo~u~uɾo~u~uɾ,mitiaj awaj ko~u~uʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ʦaaj ka ɾəmaŋaw ko~u~u ɬ~ɮamaj,anini ʦaɾəɬ~ɮəs ko~u~u kiʦiw ,awajaj to~u~u ko~u~uɬ~ɮamaj.
